error_detail: Supabase MCP nao esta configurado no .mcp.json do projeto. Credenciais SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY e NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL nao disponiveis no ambiente de execucao do agente. Adicionar Supabase MCP ao .mcp.json e restartar Claude Code para habilitar queries automaticas.
schema_note: Tabela waitlist_leads identificada e schema inspecionado. Coluna step nao existe - proxy para step2 completado = score >= 50 (servico updateLeadStep2 seta score=50). Queries adaptadas e prontas para execucao quando acesso DB for restaurado.
acao_recomendada: Configurar Supabase MCP no .mcp.json para habilitar digest automatico diario. Ver instrucoes abaixo no campo fix_required.

fix_required.solucao: Adicionar entrada supabase no .mcp.json com SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN e SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID. Reiniciar Claude Code. Re-executar este digest.

queries_prontas.q1_leads_24h_por_utm: SELECT utm_source, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score >= 50) AS completed_step_2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY utm_source ORDER BY total DESC;
queries_prontas.q2_total_acumulado: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_all_time FROM waitlist_leads;
queries_prontas.q3_ultimos_7d: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS dia, COUNT(*) AS leads_dia, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE score >= 50) AS completaram_step2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY dia DESC;
queries_prontas.q4_tempo_medio_step1_step2: SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - created_at))/60)::INT AS avg_minutes_step1_to_step2 FROM waitlist_leads WHERE score >= 50 AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';
queries_prontas.q5_top3_utms: SELECT utm_source, COUNT(*) AS total FROM waitlist_leads WHERE utm_source IS NOT NULL GROUP BY utm_source ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;
queries_prontas.q6_crescimento_7d: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS leads_ultimos_7d, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS leads_7d_anteriores FROM waitlist_leads;
